reasoning: All flagged 'unsafe' findings are in non-build scripts (development/admin tools) not executed during makepkg. PKGBUILD and install hooks are clean.
disagreement_analysis: qwen overreacted to development/admin scripts not used in AUR build process
false_positives: add_stored_proc.py: Database script not executed during build
docker/build.sh: Maintainer automation not called by PKGBUILD
lmod_beta.sh: Example init script not installed
updateLocalCache.sh/buildSystemCache.sh: Site-specific admin tools not executed
learnings: Prioritize files referenced in PKGBUILD functions (build/package) over contrib/ scripts
Improve context awareness: Distinguish build-critical vs development/admin scripts
Suppress findings in docker/, contrib/ unless PKGBUILD-invoked
Flag eval risks only when hostname/user-input is truly untrusted in build context
